hero.title:
Immigration & visa
services agency in Bangkok, Thailand
hero.description: We are an agency specialized in visa and immigration assistance and personalized service in Bangkok, Thailand.
hero.testimonialQuote: This agency helped my girlfriend get her schengen visa for our summer holiday and service was top notch.

visa.heading: Visa assistance
visa.description: Getting a visa can be a tough process and visa refusal costs not only time but also money. Our agency is specialized in visa procedures and can help you to get your visa. Whether you need a tourist, business, student, or work visa, we provide expert and comprehensive assistance. Our expert team ensures that you meet all the requirements, handles all the paperwork, prepares you for embassy interviews, and deals with the embassies for you. We streamline the visa acquisition process, making it faster and easier for you.
visa.guaranteeText: If your visa application is denied, we will issue a full refund of our service fee.

immigration.heading: Immigration assistance
immigration.description: When in a foreign country, immigration rules can be intimidating and complex, and failing to comply with those rules can have tremendous consequences. This is where an agency can be useful to help you complete your immigration procedures correctly. Our agency specializes in assisting foreigners with their immigration processes, from the essential 90-Day report in Thailand to more complex immigration procedures. Our team ensures compliance with local regulations, handles the paperwork, and manages communication with immigration authorities on your behalf.

items.title: 90-Day Report for Foreigners
items.description: We provide an extra convenient 90-Day report service for foreigners in Thailand. Our agents come pick up your documents directly at your home, do the 90 day report on your behalf and return your passport with the report receipt within 24 hours.

items.title: Driving License Renewal
items.description: Need to renew your Thai driving license? Our team handles the entire renewal process for you, from document preparation to submission at the Department of Land Transport (DLT). Save yourself the hassle and let our experienced agents take care of it.

items.title: TM.30 Update and Notification
items.description: The TM.30 is a notification of residence that must be filed for foreign nationals staying in Thailand. We handle the entire TM.30 filing and update process for you, ensuring compliance with Thai immigration regulations and helping you avoid potential fines or complications.

items.title: Document Translation and Consular Legalization for Marriage Registration
items.description: Planning to register your marriage in Thailand? We provide certified document translation and consular legalization services to ensure all your documents meet the legal requirements for marriage registration in Thailand.

items.title: Personal assistant
items.description: Do you need any assistance and to delegate some tasks on a weekly or monthly basis? We can assign one or more of our personal assistants to you. With a personal assistant you will get more time for your family or business and you will reduce your work load.

items.title: Do you need a specific service?
items.description: If you need help for any paperwork, such as getting a police certificate or any task that can be delegated, our team can help. Contact us and we will do our best to help you.

contactPage.metaDescription: Contact PT Services in Bangkok for visa assistance, immigration services, travel planning, and more. We are open Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM.
contactPage.heading: Contact us
contactPage.subtitle: We are open from Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM (UTC+7).

meta.title: 90-Day Report Service in Thailand – Bangkok, Pathum Thani & Samut Prakan - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Professional 90-day report service in Bangkok, Pathum Thani and Samut Prakan. Our staff picks up your passport, completes the report at immigration, and returns your documents the same day.

ninetyDayReport.title: 90-Day Report Service in Thailand
ninetyDayReport.featuresText: Our team handles everything from start to finish. A staff member picks up your passport directly at your residence, completes the 90-day report at the immigration office on your behalf, and returns your documents the same day. The process is fully legal, fast, and affordable, with transparent pricing and no hidden fees. We currently serve foreigners living in Bangkok, Pathum Thani, and Samut Prakan.
ninetyDayReport.documentsIntro: Our staff only need the following documents to complete the 90-day report on your behalf:
documents: A signed copy of your passport (for the power of attorney)
TM.30 form (you can send a digital file if available)
Power of attorney form (our staff will bring it for you to sign during document pickup)
ninetyDayReport.priceIntro: Our service fee depends on your location. Our pricing is transparent with no hidden fees.

faq.question: How do I book your service?
faq.answer: You can book our service simply by contacting us. We will agree on a date and a time for our staff to pick up your documents at your residence and return them once the 90-day report is completed.

faq.question: Do I need to pay in advance?
faq.answer: In most cases, no upfront payment is required. You pay only when our staff returns your documents after completing the 90-day report. However, we may sometimes request a small deposit in advance to secure your appointment and prevent no-shows.

faq.question: Do I need to go to the immigration office?
faq.answer: No, there is no need for you to visit the immigration office. Our staff handles the entire process for you. We only need a few documents: your original passport, a signed passport copy, TM.30 form, and a power of attorney form (which we bring for you to sign during pickup).

faq.question: How long does the 90-day reporting process take?
faq.answer: Our staff picks up your documents in the morning, completes the 90-day report at the immigration office, and returns your passport along with the official receipt by the afternoon. The entire process is completed within the same business day.

faq.question: How much does the 90-Day report service cost?
faq.answer:
Our service fee depends on your location:

• Bangkok: 1,000 – 1,500 THB
• Pathum Thani: 1,500 – 2,000 THB
• Samut Prakan: 1,500 – 2,000 THB

The exact price depends on where our staff needs to pick up and return your documents.

faq.question: Which areas do you cover?
faq.answer: We currently provide our 90-day report service in Bangkok, Pathum Thani, and Samut Prakan.

meta.title: TDAC Form Filling Service - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) form filling service. We prepare your TDAC in advance and deliver it online before your trip. Only 300 THB per person.

tdac.title: Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) Form Filling Service For Entry Into Thailand
tdac.intro:
Avoid wasting time queuing at the airport! Let us prepare your Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) in advance and deliver it to you online before your trip.

Our service is designed to be:
features: Easy – Just tell us your travel date, and we'll handle the rest
Fast – Receive your completed TDAC form quickly and hassle-free
Affordable – Quality service at a friendly price
tdac.priceContent: We charge a service fee of 300 THB per person.

faq.question: How do I use your service?
faq.answer: Simply contact us, provide your travel details (flight date and basic information), and we will handle the TDAC form for you. You'll receive the completed form online before your departure.

faq.question: Do I need to pay in advance?
faq.answer: Yes, the full payment of 300 THB per person is required in advance to confirm your booking and begin processing your TDAC form.

faq.question: How long does it take to complete the TDAC?
faq.answer: Normally, we will send you the completed TDAC form within 1–3 hours after we receive all the required information from you (this may vary slightly depending on the time of day and current workload).

faq.question: How much does the TDAC form filling service cost?
faq.answer: Our service fee is 300 THB per person.

meta.title: TM30 Notification & Update Service in Bangkok - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Professional TM30 residence notification and update service in Bangkok. Online TM30 filing from 300 THB, TM30 updates from 1,000 THB. Fast, legal and reliable.

tm30.title: TM30 Update & Notification Service
tm30.intro: TM30 Residence Notification is a mandatory residence reporting requirement for all foreigners staying in Thailand under immigration law. The resident or property owner must notify the Immigration Bureau within 24 hours of moving to a new address to keep the residence information accurate and up-to-date. Our TM30 Notification & Update Service is designed to meet every foreigner's need in Thailand:
features: Fast and convenient service that professionally handles your TM30 notification and updates, minimizing hassle and saving you time
Fully compliant with Thai immigration laws, ensuring your safety and the reliability of the process
Comprehensive support for foreigners of all nationalities residing in Thailand
Complete service from document preparation to submitting your TM30 report to the Immigration Bureau
Close guidance and consultation throughout the entire TM30 notification process, answering your questions promptly
tm30.documentsOnlineHeading: Documents Required for Online TM30 Submission
tm30.documentsOnlineIntro: To ensure your TM30 residence notification through the Thai Immigration Bureau's online system is fast, accurate, and complete, foreigners residing in Thailand must prepare the following essential documents:
documentsOnline: A clear photo or scanned copy of the resident's passport information page.
A clear photo or scanned copy of the latest entry stamp into Thailand.
A clear photo or scanned copy of the visa page or e-visa file.
A copy of the house registration or condominium document showing the current residence address.
A copy of the ID card of the property owner or the person responsible for the residence.
Contact phone number of the person submitting the notification.
Power of attorney document (if authorizing someone else to act on your behalf).
tm30.documentsUpdateHeading: Documents Required for TM30 Residence Update
tm30.documentsUpdateIntro: In case of any changes to your residence information or other details, please prepare the following documents for TM30 update:
documentsUpdate: Copy of ID card or passport of householder, the owner or the possessor of a dwelling place, certified as a true copy.
A certified true copy of the house registration, lease agreement, or sales contract.
Passports of all foreigners residing at the same address.
If the TM30 update is submitted late, a fine ranging from 800 to 2,000 THB may apply. Fines can be paid directly to immigration officers at the Immigration Office.
priceItems:
Online TM30 Residence Notification – Only 300 THB
Enjoy fast, convenient, and fully legal TM30 residence notification online with our expert service at just 300 THB.

TM30 Residence Update – Comprehensive Service for 1,000 THB
We provide a full-service TM30 residence update for 1,000 THB. Please note, this fee does not include any fines for late submission, which must be paid directly to immigration officers at the Immigration Office.

faq.question: How can I use your services?
faq.answer:
Simply contact us and let us know your needs whether it's TM30 online residence notification within 24 hours or TM30 residence update. The professional team at PT Services is ready to assist you quickly and accurately.

For online TM30 residence notification within 24 hours, simply submit the required documents to us as instructed, and receive your TM30 notification receipt within 1–3 hours.

For TM30 residence updates, submit your updated documents to us. Our staff will arrange a convenient appointment to collect the documents at your address and proceed with the update.

faq.question: Do I need to pay in advance?
faq.answer:
For TM30 online residence notification within 24 hours, we require full prepayment of 300 THB per person to confirm your booking and begin processing your notification quickly and accurately.

For TM30 residence updates, we require a prepayment deposit of 500 THB per person to confirm your booking and begin preparing your documents for a complete and accurate residence update.

faq.question: How long does TM30 residence notification and update take?
faq.answer:
For TM30 online residence notification within 24 hours, once you submit all required documents, the PT Services team will complete the notification and send you the residence notification receipt within 1–3 hours for your convenience and speed.

For TM30 residence updates, processing time depends on the number of visitors at the Immigration Office, but generally takes about 1–2 hours to complete on-site.

faq.question: What are the service fees for TM30 residence notification and update?
faq.answer: Our online TM30 residence notification service within 24 hours is available for just 300 THB per person, providing fast and convenient assistance for foreigners residing in Thailand. For TM30 residence updates, we offer a comprehensive and fully compliant service at 1,000 THB per person, including professional guidance throughout the entire process.

meta.title: Thai Driving License Application & Renewal for Foreigners in Bangkok - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Thai driving license application and renewal service for foreigners in Bangkok. Complete end-to-end service from 4,000 to 6,500 THB including vehicle for driving test.

driverLicense.title: Thai Driving License Application & Renewal Services in Bangkok for Foreigners – Convenient, Fast and Fully Legal
driverLicense.intro:
If you are a foreigner living in Bangkok and need to renew a Thai driving license or apply for a Thai driving license for the first time, whether for a car or motorcycle, our service is here to make the entire process simple, convenient and stress-free.

For those applying for a Thai driving license for the first time, we take care of every step from eligibility checks and preparation of all required documents to advance appointment booking with the Department of Land Transport, as well as guidance and on-site support on the day of application. You don't need to worry about complicated procedures or communication with officials.

For Thai driving license renewals, we help reduce delays and hassle by handling document preparation, verification and appointment scheduling efficiently.

Our professional team provides a complete, end-to-end service, ensuring that every step is handled legally and correctly, so you can drive in Thailand with confidence, safety, and peace of mind.
driverLicense.docsFirstTimeHeading: Documents Required for Foreigners Applying for a Thai Driving License (First-Time Application)
docsFirstTime: Passport (Copy of the personal information page/Copy of the latest visa page/Copy of the most recent Thailand entry stamp page)
driverLicense.docsRenewalHeading: Documents Required for Foreigners to Renew a Thai Driving License
docsRenewal: Passport (Copy of the personal information page/Copy of the latest visa page/Copy of the most recent Thailand entry stamp page)
driverLicense.priceHeading: Thai Driving License Application & Renewal Service Fees for Foreigners
driverLicense.priceIntro:
Our service fees range from THB 4,000 to THB 6,500.
This price includes all processing and handling, so you don't need to worry about any hidden or additional charges. Everything is clearly covered to ensure a smooth, transparent and stress-free experience.
priceIncludes: Vehicle Provided for the Driving Test
Driving License Fee at the Department of Land Transport
driverLicense.priceNote: Note that the Residence Certificate is not included.

faq.question: How can I book your service?
faq.answer:
You can easily book our Thai driving license application or renewal service by simply contacting us and informing us of your request. After that, please send photos of your existing driving license or available documents for our team to conduct a preliminary review.

Once the information is verified, we will provide a clear summary of the service fees, explain the process step by step, and take care of you throughout the entire procedure until completion. Every step is handled legally, efficiently and professionally, ensuring a smooth experience while saving you valuable time with complete peace of mind.

faq.question: Do I need to make a payment in advance?
faq.answer: Yes. Full payment is required before the process begins so our team can immediately proceed with document preparation, training arrangements and appointment booking with the Department of Land Transport.

faq.question: How long does it take to apply for a new Thai driving license or renew an existing one?
faq.answer:
For a first-time Thai driving license application, the process generally takes around 2 working days, depending on successfully passing the required theory exams and driving tests as stipulated by the Department of Land Transport.

For Thai driving license renewal, the process can usually be completed within 1 day, provided that all required documents are complete. Our team closely manages and coordinates every step to ensure the process is fast, legally compliant and efficient, helping you save as much time as possible while avoiding unnecessary complications.

faq.question: Which areas does this service cover?
faq.answer: This service is available for foreigners residing in Bangkok and nearby areas.

meta.title: Document Translation & Consular Legalization for Marriage Registration in Thailand - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Professional document translation and consular legalization service for marriage registration in Thailand. Fixed fee of 5,500 THB. Certified translators, MFA legalization.

marriageTranslation.title: Document Translation and Consular Legalization Service for Marriage Registration in Thailand
marriageTranslation.intro: If you are planning to marry a Thai citizen or register your marriage in Thailand, preparing the correct documents is a crucial step. Our all-in-one service covers every stage of the process:
introFeatures: Professional Document Translation (English–Thai / Thai–English / other languages) by certified translators
Consular Legalization Certified signature verification from the Department of Consular Affairs, Ministry of Foreign Affairs
Expert Guidance & Document Review Ensuring your paperwork meets all requirements for a smooth marriage registration process in Thailand
suitableItems: Foreigners who wish to register their marriage with a Thai citizen
Couples who need to submit foreign-issued documents for use in Thailand
Those who require accurate translation and legalization of documents in compliance with Thai government procedures
processItems: Verify the original documents and ensure their accuracy
Translate by a professional translator with a certified signature on the translation
Submit the documents for consular legalization at the Department of Consular Affairs
Return the legalized documents to the client, ready for use
marriageTranslation.priceHeading: Document Translation and Consular Legalization Service Fee
marriageTranslation.priceContent: A fixed service fee of 5,500 THB covers professional document translation and consular legalization by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs for marriage registration in Thailand. This all-inclusive price includes every step from certified professional translation and thorough document verification to completing the legalization process in full compliance with official Thai government standards.
marriageTranslation.tipsHeading: Tips for Using Our Document Translation & Consular Legalization Service for a Smooth and Fast Process
marriageTranslation.tipsContent: For a smooth and efficient experience with our document translation and consular legalization service for marriage registration in Thailand, we recommend booking your appointment at least 2–3 weeks in advance. This allows our team to secure a timeslot with the Department of Consular Affairs, Ministry of Foreign Affairs, within the required timeframe. Once all documents are complete and ready for processing, the legalization procedure takes approximately 7–10 business days. You can be confident that your documents will be properly legalized in full compliance with official Thai government procedures ready for immediate use in your marriage registration.
marriageTranslation.ctaHeading: Let Us Handle Every Step for You
marriageTranslation.ctaContent: Simply contact us and let us know you need our document translation and consular legalization service for marriage registration we'll take care of everything from start to finish with a seamless, all-in-one process:
ctaSteps: Contact us and share your requirements
Make the payment and schedule a document handover with our staff
Submit your documents for review and processing
Receive your translated and fully legalized documents within 7–10 business days
marriageTranslation.ctaFooter: With our service, you can be confident that your paperwork will be accurate, fully compliant with official Thai government standards, and ready to use immediately without the hassle of handling the process yourself.
